title: Design Overhaul + Compare Logs + Blend History

changes.text: Compare Logs view: select any two garage logs to see a side-by-side metric delta table (AFR, HPFP, IAT, timing pull, health score) and an overlaid AFR/boost chart
Health Trend Chart: the static tune health gauge on the dashboard is replaced with a 14-log sparkline that shows health score trajectory and point delta across recent sessions
Car profile widgets now appear at the top of the dashboard kanban so your active car is always one click away without navigating to Settings
AFR distribution histogram in the Analyzer shows sample count per 0.25 AFR bucket, color-coded green (near target), amber (drift), and red (out of bounds)
Timing correction distribution histogram in the Analyzer shows how often each degree of pull was recorded, green for positive values, amber for mild pulls, red for hard pulls
Blend composition bar in the Blend Calculator: an animated stacked bar shows the E85-to-pump-gas ratio visually after every calculation
Blend history panel: every calculation is stored and viewable via the new History button in the Blend Calculator header, with date, volumes, and resulting blend
Log-to-blend integration: after analyzing a log, a 'Use Exx in blend lab' button appears in the Analyzer that pre-fills the current ethanol field in the Calculator and shows a confirmation banner
Dark/light theme switching now crossfades over 150ms instead of flashing instantly
Analyzer loading state replaced with a skeleton shimmer layout that mirrors the results structure, reducing perceived wait time
Empty kanban columns now show contextual empty states with action buttons instead of generic placeholder text
CSS token system expanded with spacing, border-radius, shadow, and transition-duration variables for consistent styling across the app
Interactive card hover/active states and standardized focus ring and disabled styles added globally
Set any saved car as 'Active' — the Analyzer dropdowns auto-populate with that car's engine, tune stage, and fuel blend on every upload
Each car card now has an 'Analyze' button that pre-fills the analyzer settings for that car and navigates directly to the Analyzer tab
Car cards show a log count and most recent health score pulled from the Archive, matching on engine, tune stage, and ethanol blend
Archive tab now shows car filter pills — click a saved car nickname to filter the log list to entries that match that car's specs
Full app redesign with a cleaner layout and updated visual style
Restored the core product workflows inside the redesigned shell: Log Analyzer, Log Viewer, Blend Lab, Garage archive, and Settings are now available again from the unified navigation
Analyzer uploads now run the existing safety-analysis pipeline again, including AFR/HPFP/IAT/timing diagnostics, key points, compare overlays, and saved session history
Viewer uploads are functional again with automatic channel detection, normalized multi-series charting, searchable channel selection, and brush-based telemetry review
Blend tools are fully wired back up, including active-blend saving, reverse refuel math, pump calibration, fill-cost estimates, multi-tank planning, saved profiles, and station presets
Garage archive management is live again with reopen-in-analyzer, reopen-in-viewer, editable tags and notes, CSV/JSON export, and JSON import support
Settings now control the rebuilt interface directly, including live theme switching, unit preferences, and viewer rendering options carried through the new workspace shell
Synced the in-app version constant with the changelog so the Update Log surfaces the current release correctly
Patched the new theme system so saved light/dark preferences affect the redesigned interface visually instead of only persisting in storage
Completed a verification pass after the rebuild: production build succeeds and the existing parser, compare, storage, and blend-math tests remain green

title: SaaS Redesign + iOS Status Bar & Haptics Fixes

changes.text: Full UI overhaul with Linear/Vercel-inspired dark theme: squared borders, teal accents, and a cleaner design system throughout
Redesigned sidebar with grouped navigation (Overview, Analysis, Fuel, System), collapsible 60px icon-only mode, and BETA badge on Log Analyzer
Mobile header now sits below the status bar using env(safe-area-inset-top), so the hamburger menu no longer overlaps the clock
Haptics import timeout added so a slow Capacitor plugin startup can no longer block the pull-to-refresh callback and leave the Refreshing banner stuck permanently
Pull-to-refresh now has a 5-second safety timeout so the refresh indicator always clears even if the data fetch stalls
Tune Health Score card redesigned with stacked ring-plus-label layout to avoid text truncation when breakdown data is present
Fuel Planner output now includes its own gallons/litres result-unit toggle so cost and trip recommendations are easier to read in your preferred unit
Refuel Planner now lets you enter the amount being added in gallons or litres independently from the rest of the calculator

title: Fuel Planner Clarity + Tank Capacity Units

changes.text: Fuel Planner now explains which inputs are required, which sections are optional, and what each planner field is used for
Added a clearer planner summary so the output shows the current tank state, target blend, pump ethanol, and trip assumptions being used
Tank capacity can now be entered independently in gallons or litres without changing the rest of the calculator input units
Added Log Garage with backup export/import, richer history storage, and CSV reopen support
Expanded Log Analyzer compare mode into a fuller comparison workflow for side-by-side review
Added batch log import and dashboard trend baselines for reviewing multiple sessions over time
Analyzer now surfaces diagnostic issue cards to highlight likely problem areas faster
Calculator now includes Fuel Planner tools like pump calibration, station presets, cost optimization, and trip planning
Trimmed unfinished Settings sections and removed unused persisted options for a cleaner surface
Added a more resilient telemetry pipeline with server-side ingest for client events and error reporting
Expanded automated coverage for settings behavior, compare logic, and CSV viewer parsing
Removed duplicate Log Analyzer imports that could break builds after the feature merges
Dashboard pull-to-refresh now stops cleanly instead of getting stuck showing the refresh banner
Added stronger in-flight refresh guards so a single pull gesture cannot retrigger overlapping refresh cycles
Touch cancel handling now resets pull distance state correctly during interrupted refresh gestures

title: Status Bar Contrast + Smoother Tab Switching

changes.text: Corrected status bar style mapping so light mode uses dark time/battery text and dark mode uses light text
Switched to a hybrid loading strategy: core tabs load eagerly while heavier analysis pages stay lazy
Added idle-time preloading for heavy route chunks to reduce first-switch lag between tabs/screens
Updated Capacitor StatusBar/Keyboard default style config to follow system appearance at startup
Prevented unwanted zoom while typing by enforcing iOS-safe form input sizing and tightening touch zoom handling behavior
Calculator numeric parsing now preserves valid 0 values instead of coercing them into blank fields
Hardened native async listener setup/cleanup paths to avoid duplicate listeners during remounts
Route screens and overlays now lazy-load to reduce initial bundle work and improve startup responsiveness
Mobile menu trigger is now a semantic button for better interaction reliability and accessibility

title: Blend Unit Flexibility + iOS Visual Fixes

changes.text: Blend Calculator now supports independent result units, so you can input tank values in litres but view fill amounts in gallons (or vice versa)
Status bar style mapping corrected so light-theme iOS status text/icons render dark for better readability
Onboarding modal now opens centered on iPhone instead of being anchored to the bottom edge
Keyboard appearance and resize behavior improved to prevent the black overlay/gap effect while typing in calculator fields
App shell now uses dynamic viewport sizing and explicit root background handling for cleaner mobile rendering
Added full safe-area handling for top and bottom insets so mobile nav/content no longer overlap the home indicator
Status bar now syncs to light/dark theme and uses transparent overlay behavior
Applied 16px form control font-size to prevent iOS input auto-zoom on focus
PNG export now opens the native share sheet (Save Image, AirDrop, etc.) on iOS
Calculator now listens for keyboard events and scrolls active fields into view
Dashboard now supports pull-to-refresh gesture with haptic feedback
Configured Capacitor splash screen and status bar plugin settings for branded launch behavior
Enabled momentum/touch scrolling behavior for long scroll containers
Added offline-awareness banner using Capacitor Network (with web fallback)
Onboarding and changelog modals now support drag-down-to-dismiss gesture
Update Log now includes platform filter tabs: All, Web, and iOS
HPFP crash detection now prioritizes high pedal/throttle demand and compares HPFP target vs actual more accurately
Tune health score now penalizes severe HPFP crashes correctly instead of showing inflated "Good" scores
BM3 vs MHD auto-detection improved for BM3 headers like bootmod3/(BM3), Pre-Throttle Boost, and HPFP Target variants
Recent logs now recalculate health scores from saved analyses to avoid stale score values
New Settings > Update Log tab lets you open changelog history anytime after onboarding
Saved blend profiles — store and reload your favourite tank setups
Refuel Planner mode in the Calculator
Estimated octane output shown after every blend calculation
Knock event scatter chart — RPM vs load with severity coloring
LTFT/STFT fuel trim analysis by RPM zone
Multi-log compare overlay in Log Analyzer
Chart annotations — tap to pin notes at any time index
PNG export for any chart view
Auto-detect BM3 vs MHD log format with badge
Tune health score (0–100) per log, shown on Dashboard
Log health timeline chart on Dashboard
Haptic feedback on iOS for calculation results and risk alerts
Station finder link to nearest E85 pump
Full log analyzer with AFR, boost, HPFP, and IAT gauges
Timing correction per-cylinder heatmap
Dashboard redesign with active blend card
E85 blend calculator with precision mode
Dark mode support
iOS app via Capacitor
